items.title: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara Is Free
items.summary: The Cuban dissident artist is exiled to the US and a Homerist reviews Christopher Nolan’s “The Odyssey.”

items.title: A Homerist’s Review of “The Odyssey”
items.summary: Historian Joel Christensen reacts to Christopher Nolan’s epic, artists speak candidly about AI, and a forthcoming film adaptation of the Louvre heist.

items.title: A Homerist Reacts to Christopher Nolan’s “The Odyssey”
items.summary: “This is a tale of a man affected by trauma, but without any sense that it changed him at all.”

items.title: New Museum's Shiny New Building Leaks During Flash Floods
items.summary: No artworks were harmed, but extreme weather shuttered the Lower Manhattan museum for a full weekend.
